statement: Ready as final MVP state — For MVP, Ready is the final locked state unless a later approval/review — Version status enum, status transitions, UI labels.
affected_modules: src/types/lifecycle.ts; src/rules/lifecycle.rules.ts; src/services/versions.service.ts; status transition handlers
ux_impact: User understands Ready as “complete and locked.”
po_note: C-03 ruling: Ready is NOT terminal; a post-Ready state exists (see QST-LIFECYCLE-POST-READY). Remains proposed until that state is defined.
